values.message:
=Eres un asistente experto en supply chain y comunicación con proveedores de China.

Analiza este email y extrae la siguiente información en formato JSON:

{
  "supplier_name": "nombre del proveedor si se identifica",
  "products": ["lista de productos o SKUs mencionados"],
  "prices": [{"product": "...", "price": 0, "currency": "USD"}],
  "lead_time_days": 0,
  "tracking_number": "si mencionan tracking",
  "quality_issue": true/false,
  "moq": 0,
  "summary": "resumen en español de 2-3 líneas",
  "sentiment": "positive/neutral/negative/urgent",
  "key_topics": ["array de temas clave"],
  "action_items": [{"task": "...", "deadline": "YYYY-MM-DD", "completed": false}],
  "needs_response": true/false,
  "priority": "low/normal/high/urgent"
}

Email:
From: {{ $json.payload.headers.find(h => h.name === 'From').value }}
Subject: {{ $json.payload.headers.find(h => h.name === 'Subject').value }}
Body: {{ $json.snippet }}

Responde SOLO con el JSON, sin texto adicional.

=Eres un asistente experto en gestión de proyectos y comunicación con clientes.

Analiza este email y extrae la siguiente información en formato JSON:

{
  "client_name": "nombre del cliente si se identifica",
  "project_name": "nombre/código del proyecto mencionado",
  "requested_products": ["lista de productos solicitados"],
  "budget_mentioned": 0,
  "deadline": "YYYY-MM-DD si mencionan fecha",
  "approval_status": "pending/approved/rejected",
  "complaint": true/false,
  "summary": "resumen en español de 2-3 líneas",
  "sentiment": "positive/neutral/negative/urgent",
  "key_topics": ["array de temas clave"],
  "action_items": [{"task": "...", "deadline": "YYYY-MM-DD", "completed": false}],
  "needs_response": true/false,
  "priority": "low/normal/high/urgent"
}

Email:
From: {{ $json.payload.headers.find(h => h.name === 'From').value }}
Subject: {{ $json.payload.headers.find(h => h.name === 'Subject').value }}
Body: {{ $json.snippet }}

Responde SOLO con el JSON, sin texto adicional.

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO email_threads (
  thread_id,
  type,
  supplier_id,
  subject,
  from_email,
  from_name,
  to_email,
  last_message,
  last_received_at,
  summary,
  sentiment,
  key_topics,
  action_items,
  extracted_data,
  needs_response,
  priority
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.threadId }}',
  'supplier',
  (SELECT id FROM suppliers WHERE email ILIKE '%{{ $json.ai_analysis.supplier_name }}%' LIMIT 1),
  '{{ $json.payload.headers.find(h => h.name === "Subject").value }}',
  '{{ $json.payload.headers.find(h => h.name === "From").value }}',
  '{{ $json.payload.headers.find(h => h.name === "From").value.split("<")[0].trim() }}',
  'suppliers@interasia.com.co',
  '{{ $json.snippet }}',
  to_timestamp({{ $json.internalDate }}/1000),
  '{{ $json.ai_analysis.summary }}',
  '{{ $json.ai_analysis.sentiment }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.ai_analysis.key_topics) }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.ai_analysis.action_items) }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.ai_analysis) }}',
  {{ $json.ai_analysis.needs_response }},
  '{{ $json.ai_analysis.priority }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (thread_id) DO UPDATE SET
  last_message = EXCLUDED.last_message,
  last_received_at = EXCLUDED.last_received_at,
  summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
  sentiment = EXCLUDED.sentiment,
  key_topics = EXCLUDED.key_topics,
  action_items = EXCLUDED.action_items,
  extracted_data = EXCLUDED.extracted_data,
  needs_response = EXCLUDED.needs_response,
  priority = EXCLUDED.priority,
  message_count = email_threads.message_count + 1,
  updated_at = now()
RETURNING *;

=INSERT INTO email_threads (
  thread_id,
  type,
  client_id,
  subject,
  from_email,
  from_name,
  to_email,
  last_message,
  last_received_at,
  summary,
  sentiment,
  key_topics,
  action_items,
  extracted_data,
  needs_response,
  priority
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.threadId }}',
  'client',
  (SELECT id FROM clients WHERE name ILIKE '%{{ $json.ai_analysis.client_name }}%' LIMIT 1),
  '{{ $json.payload.headers.find(h => h.name === "Subject").value }}',
  '{{ $json.payload.headers.find(h => h.name === "From").value }}',
  '{{ $json.payload.headers.find(h => h.name === "From").value.split("<")[0].trim() }}',
  'proyectos@interasia.com.co',
  '{{ $json.snippet }}',
  to_timestamp({{ $json.internalDate }}/1000),
  '{{ $json.ai_analysis.summary }}',
  '{{ $json.ai_analysis.sentiment }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.ai_analysis.key_topics) }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.ai_analysis.action_items) }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.ai_analysis) }}',
  {{ $json.ai_analysis.needs_response }},
  '{{ $json.ai_analysis.priority }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (thread_id) DO UPDATE SET
  last_message = EXCLUDED.last_message,
  last_received_at = EXCLUDED.last_received_at,
  summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
  sentiment = EXCLUDED.sentiment,
  key_topics = EXCLUDED.key_topics,
  action_items = EXCLUDED.action_items,
  extracted_data = EXCLUDED.extracted_data,
  needs_response = EXCLUDED.needs_response,
  priority = EXCLUDED.priority,
  message_count = email_threads.message_count + 1,
  updated_at = now()
RETURNING *;
